name: Mississippi, ex rel. Hood v. AU Optronics Corp.
question: Was the case properly removed to federal district court as a mass action under the Class Action Fairness Act (CAFA)?
description: A case in which the Court ruled that, in order for a case to be removed to a federal district court instead of a state court under the Class Action Fairness Act, at least 100 people must be represented by the lawsuit.
